title: Vetheroac
description: A TNT mod all about physics, good looks and lots of tnts, and other physics interactions
body:
This Mod is still in alpha so expect bugs please report them

This Mod is all about explosions, physics and custom tnts, and other physics interactions

sorry, but this mod is designed to be only played in creative.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/06JviEoVX64" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

<summary>latest release v0.6:</summary>
  after 5 versions, finally added custom textures for TNTS!!!!
